title: TConJEI
description: A JEI addon for Tinker's Construct 3
body:
Quickly look up **any** Tinker's material's stats and traits through JEI recipes!

![alt text](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/paypur/TConJEI/refs/heads/1.19.2/assets/preview.png)

Any add-on materials should be supported.
Using [slightly improved font](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/slightly-improved-font) by LatvianModder is recommended.

Inspired by Tinker's JEI by possible_triangle.
